description_long: This object is a pair of shoes with a modern, boxy silhouette and a predominantly white exterior accented by bold black panels. The shoes feature a thick, rectangular sole and a high, structured upper, giving them a geometric and contemporary appearance. The black sections are located on the front, sides, and top, creating a striking contrast with the white body. There is a cutout or handle-like feature on the top, possibly for easy carrying or as a design element. The shoes appear to be slip-on style, with no visible laces or fastenings. The overall design suggests a focus on both style and functionality, suitable for urban environments.
description: A pair of modern, slip-on shoes with a white body and bold black geometric accents, featuring a thick sole and structured upper.
description_view_0: Front view shows a rectangular black panel and a handle-like cutout on the top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the black panel extending along the side and the curved white body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a mostly white surface with a small black cutout at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the first side, with black and white contrast and a visible side panel.
